tweets.text: Bitcoin Reaches $65.5K as Iran Deal Weighs on Oil to 16-Week Low

tweets.author: rwatimes.bsky.social
tweets.text: ➤ Technical indicators suggest Bitcoin is facing resistance around $68,200-$68,500, with traders monitoring key support levels around $65,000.

tweets.author: rwatimes.bsky.social
tweets.text: ➤ The decision, linked to diplomatic progress and a commitment to free transit through the Strait of Hormuz, led to lower oil prices and boosted risk appetite for assets like Bitcoin.

tweets.author: rwatimes.bsky.social
tweets.text:
Bitcoin price reclaims $65K after Bessent opens Iran oil door
Jun 22 2026 15:57 UTC
Bitcoin price reclaimed $65,000 after the U.S. approved temporary Iranian oil sales, while lower crude prices lifted risk appetite.
#bitcoin #iranian-oil-sales #geopolitical-developments #risk-app
